title: Bitter Crumbly Venezuelan Bean Soup
description: A bold, slightly bitter bean soup with a crunchy coconut yogurt crumble topping, inspired by Venezuelan flavors and designed to be dairy‑free.

ingredients.name: cooked red kidney beans
ingredients.notes: cooked from dried beans or canned, rinsed

instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large pot over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent, about 3 minutes.
Stir in the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
Add the chopped bitter gourd and smoked paprika, cook for 2 minutes, letting the bitterness mellow.
Pour in the vegetable broth and bring the mixture to a gentle simmer.
Add the cooked kidney beans and let the soup simmer for 10 minutes, allowing flavors to meld.
Stir in the coconut yogurt, warming it through without boiling to keep the yogurt from curdling.
Taste and season with salt and pepper.
Serve the soup hot, garnished with toasted pumpkin seeds for a crumbly crunch and a sprinkle of fresh cilantro.
